title: Aureline conflict-resolution session vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the conflict-resolution-session record family frozen in docs/vcs/merge_and_conflict_contract.md. One conflict_resolution_session_record pins which conflict a surface is resolving (conflict_class_record_id_ref pointing into schemas/vcs/conflict_class.schema.json; the base/current/incoming/result locator quartet pinned to opaque revision and artifact identity refs; the per-class side-of-truth labels resolved from the conflict-class row; the unresolved_count and the unresolved_count_navigation_class so reviewers can see how many hunks / cells / sections remain; the resolution surface and fallback-to-text class actually rendered; the regenerate-first canonical input ref when the class requires it; the optional external-tool round-trip envelope when the class routes through external handoff; the recovery_object_ref pinned at admission so abandon rolls back deterministically and reopen reattaches safely; the abandon_reopen_safety_class; the session lifecycle drawn from the closed seven-value vocabulary; the actor / command / approval-ticket attribution; and the ordered_action_id_refs chain into conflict_resolution_action_record rows). One conflict_resolution_action_record pins one resolution action (action_class drawn from the closed ten-value vocabulary covering choose-source-current/incoming, accept-hunk-from-current/incoming, accept-combined-user-edited, regenerate-from-canonical-input, external-tool-handoff-round-trip-required, merge-complete-admit-result, abandon-rollback-to-recovery-object, reopen-after-validation-hint-review; consequence_class drawn from the closed six-value vocabulary; the targeted hunk / cell / section ref; the optional output_revision_id_ref produced by the action). One audit stream (conflict_resolution_session) carries the closed denial-reason and event-id vocabularies. The session pairs through merge_validation_hint_id_refs into schemas/vcs/merge_validation_hint.schema.json so blocking validation hints prevent merge-complete admission. Local Git / structured-artifact / generator-input / notebook / evidence truth (drawn from the conflict-class row) is authoritative; raw text fallback is admissible only when the conflict-class row's fallback_to_text_class is raw_text_fallback_explicit_user_acknowledged_lossy. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit / remote URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw notebook output bytes, raw generator argv, raw secrets, and raw lockfile / SBOM bodies MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema. The eventual git-service crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, session_lifecycle_state, action_class, action_consequence_class, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps conflict_resolution_session_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

conflict_resolution_session_schema_versi.description: Integer schema version for the conflict-resolution-session vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit / remote URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw notebook output bytes, raw generator argv, raw secrets, and raw lockfile / SBOM bodies never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under.

conflict_class_value.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/vcs/conflict_class.schema.json. Pinned on the session row so the resolution surface, the merge-complete admission gate, and the audit lane all agree on the conflict class without re-resolving the conflict_class_record_id_ref.

resolution_surface_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/vcs/conflict_class.schema.json. The session row pins the actually-rendered surface; a row whose surface does not match the conflict_class_value's required surface denies with resolution_surface_must_match_conflict_class.

fallback_to_text_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/vcs/conflict_class.schema.json. raw_text_fallback_explicit_user_acknowledged_lossy is admissible only on structured_config_key_aware_merge sessions whose audit stream carries a paired text_fallback_lossy_paired_with_structured_artifact validation hint.

session_lifecycle_state.description: Frozen session-lifecycle vocabulary. session_completed_merge_admitted MUST cite a non-null result_revision_id_ref and a non-null completed_at; session_abandoned_rolled_back_to_recovery_object MUST cite the recovery object the session pinned at admission and a non-null abandoned_at; session_archived_tombstone MUST cite a non-null archived_at.

action_class.description: Frozen resolution-action vocabulary. choose_source_* takes one side wholesale (admissible on every conflict class except evidence_immutable_no_merge). accept_hunk_* takes a single hunk / cell / section from one side (forbidden on binary_or_unmergeable_choose_source_only — denies with choose_source_only_class_forbids_accept_hunk). accept_combined_hunk_user_edited produces a user-edited combined hunk. regenerate_from_canonical_input is the regenerate-first action; admissible only when the conflict class is regenerate_first_required_*. external_tool_handoff_round_trip_required hands the conflict to an external tool and pauses the session. merge_complete_admit_result admits the resolution; denied when blocking validation hints are open. abandon_rollback_to_recovery_object rolls back to the recovery object pinned at admission. reopen_after_validation_hint_review reattaches a paused session after a validation hint is acknowledged or resolved.

action_consequence_class.description: Frozen action-consequence vocabulary. evidence_immutable_no_consequence_admissible is the only consequence reachable from an evidence_immutable_no_merge row and pairs with no admissible action class. irreversible_provider_side_effect_blocked_until_admission covers a merge-complete that would publish to a provider before approval-ticket admission and denies.

external_tool_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the external tool the handoff routed through (e.g. a Git mergetool registry id). Raw tool argv and raw filesystem paths never appear here.

round_trip_artifact_ref.description: Opaque ref to the round-trip artifact the external tool returned. Required (non-null) when round_trip_verification_state is round_trip_verified_against_corpus or round_trip_verification_pending; null when the handoff has not yet returned.

round_trip_verification_state.description: Closed verification state. merge_complete_admit_result is admissible only when round_trip_verification_state is round_trip_verified_against_corpus.

external_tool_handoff_envelope.description: External-tool handoff envelope. Required (non-null) when resolution_surface_class is external_tool_handoff_with_round_trip_required.

canonical_input_ref.description: Opaque ref to the canonical input row (e.g. the manifest a lockfile is regenerated from, the generator-input record a generated source is regenerated from). Raw paths, raw URLs, and raw input payloads never appear here.

canonical_input_pin_class.description: Closed pin class. canonical_input_pin_drifted_warning emits a regenerate_input_drifted_from_pin warning hint; canonical_input_pin_drifted_blocking pairs with a blocking_must_resolve_before_merge_complete validation hint.

regenerate_canonical_input_envelope.description: Regenerate-first canonical-input envelope. Required (non-null) when resolution_surface_class is regenerate_first_with_canonical_input_pinned.

conflict_resolution_session_denial_reaso.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the conflict_resolution_session audit stream.

conflict_resolution_session_audit_event_.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the conflict_resolution_session stream. conflict_resolution_session_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a conflict_resolution_session_denial_reason.

workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the workspace row in schemas/workspace/* the session is bound to.

conflict_class_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the conflict_class_record row (schemas/vcs/conflict_class.schema.json) this session resolves against. Always non-null; a session that omits this ref denies with conflict_class_record_id_ref_required.

history_operation_state_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the history_operation_state_record (schemas/vcs/history_operation_state.schema.json) the session is bound to (a paused merge / rebase / cherry-pick / revert / mailbox-apply). Null when the session was minted outside an in-progress history operation (e.g. a stash-apply conflict on a clean worktree).

base_revision_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the base revision (the merge base / fork point) the conflict was minted against.

current_revision_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the current-side revision. The current side is the local-branch head at conflict mint.

incoming_revision_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the incoming-side revision. The incoming side is the merge / rebase / cherry-pick source.

result_revision_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the result revision the session admitted. Required (non-null) when session_lifecycle_state is session_completed_merge_admitted (denies with merge_complete_result_revision_required); null otherwise.

artifact_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the artifact identity (path-equivalent locator family token) the conflict targets. Raw absolute paths never appear here.

unresolved_count.description: Count of unresolved hunks / cells / sections remaining. The unresolved_count_navigation_class governs how the surface renders this count and what 'next unresolved' navigation means.

regenerate_canonical_input_envelope.description: Required (non-null) when resolution_surface_class is regenerate_first_with_canonical_input_pinned (denies with regenerate_first_canonical_input_pinned_required). Null otherwise.

external_tool_handoff_envelope.description: Required (non-null) when resolution_surface_class is external_tool_handoff_with_round_trip_required (denies with external_tool_handoff_envelope_required). Null otherwise.

recovery_object_ref.description: Opaque ref to the pre-mutation recovery object the session pinned at admission. Always non-null on every lifecycle past session_drafted_no_resolution_in_progress (denies with session_recovery_object_required_at_admission and abandon_reopen_recovery_object_required).

ordered_action_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to conflict_resolution_action_record rows in resolution order. Empty in session_drafted_no_resolution_in_progress; non-empty thereafter.

merge_validation_hint_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to merge_validation_hint_record rows emitted against this session. A session whose lifecycle is session_completed_merge_admitted MUST resolve every hint whose severity is blocking_must_resolve_before_merge_complete to lifecycle hint_resolved (denies with merge_complete_blocked_pending_blocking_validation_hint).

completed_at.description: Required (non-null) when session_lifecycle_state is session_completed_merge_admitted. Null otherwise.

abandoned_at.description: Required (non-null) when session_lifecycle_state is session_abandoned_rolled_back_to_recovery_object. Null otherwise.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when session_lifecycle_state is session_archived_tombstone. Null otherwise.

merge_conflict_class_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for cross-citation by paired merge / conflict-class records minted by other surfaces. Currently always null on rows that themselves resolve a conflict; non-null only when this session is itself a downstream consumer of another merge / conflict-class record.

history_edit_recovery_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the dedicated history-edit recovery contract. Currently always null.

allOf.description: session_completed_merge_admitted MUST cite a non-null result_revision_id_ref and a non-null completed_at and null abandoned_at.
session_abandoned_rolled_back_to_recovery_object MUST cite a non-null abandoned_at and null completed_at and null result_revision_id_ref.
session_archived_tombstone MUST cite a non-null archived_at.

session_drafted_no_resolution_in_progress, session_active_resolution_in_progress, session_paused_pending_external_tool_handoff, and session_paused_pending_validation_hint_review MUST cite null completed_at, null abandoned_at, null archived_at, and null result_revision_id_ref.

structured_config_key_aware_merge MUST cite structure_aware_merge_view_with_unknown_key_preservation and count_required_with_next_cell_or_section_navigation, and the fallback_to_text_class MUST be one of the structured-admissible values (no_fallback_admitted_native_surface_only or raw_text_fallback_explicit_user_acknowledged_lossy).

lockfile_or_dependency_manifest_regenerate_first MUST cite regenerate_first_with_canonical_input_pinned, count_not_applicable_regenerate_first, raw_text_fallback_forbidden_for_class, and a non-null regenerate_canonical_input_envelope.

generated_or_derived_source_regenerate_first MUST cite regenerate_first_with_canonical_input_pinned, count_not_applicable_regenerate_first, raw_text_fallback_forbidden_for_class, and a non-null regenerate_canonical_input_envelope.
binary_or_unmergeable_choose_source_only MUST cite choose_source_only_no_byte_merge, count_not_applicable_choose_source_only, and raw_text_fallback_forbidden_for_class.

evidence_immutable_no_merge MUST cite evidence_reader_no_resolution_admissible, count_not_applicable_evidence_immutable, raw_text_fallback_forbidden_for_class, and abandon_blocked_pending_user_review.
external_tool_handoff_with_round_trip_required surface MUST cite a non-null external_tool_handoff_envelope (denies with external_tool_handoff_envelope_required); other surfaces MUST cite null.
regenerate_first_with_canonical_input_pinned surface MUST cite a non-null regenerate_canonical_input_envelope; other surfaces MUST cite null.

conflict_resolution_session_record.description: Row shape consumed by the merge / resolution surface, the change-stack panel, the source-control panel, the AI branch-agent panel, the support / export bundle, and the audit lane. Exactly one row per conflict-resolution-session identity.

conflict_resolution_session_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the parent conflict_resolution_session_record.

ordinal.description: Zero-based position in the parent session's ordered_action_id_refs.

target_hunk_or_cell_or_section_ref.description: Opaque ref to the targeted hunk / cell / section. Required (non-null) when action_class is accept_hunk_from_current, accept_hunk_from_incoming, or accept_combined_hunk_user_edited; null on choose-source / regenerate / external-tool-handoff / merge-complete / abandon / reopen actions.

output_revision_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the revision the action produced. Required (non-null) when action_class is merge_complete_admit_result; null otherwise.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval-ticket admitting the action. Required (non-null) when action_class is merge_complete_admit_result, abandon_rollback_to_recovery_object, regenerate_from_canonical_input, or external_tool_handoff_round_trip_required; nullable on local-only choose-source / accept-hunk actions.

allOf.description: merge_complete_admit_result MUST cite a non-null output_revision_id_ref and a non-null approval_ticket_ref.
abandon_rollback_to_recovery_object, regenerate_from_canonical_input, and external_tool_handoff_round_trip_required MUST cite a non-null approval_ticket_ref.
accept_hunk_from_current, accept_hunk_from_incoming, and accept_combined_hunk_user_edited MUST cite a non-null target_hunk_or_cell_or_section_ref.

conflict_resolution_action_record.description: Row shape for one resolution action recorded against a session. Exactly one row per ordinal.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is conflict_resolution_session_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

conflict_resolution_session_audit_event_.description: Audit-event row on the conflict_resolution_session stream.
